---
title: "test_generate_tests_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_generate_tests_empire.py"
loc: 14
complexity: 2
logic_score: 5.33
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 3.08
---

## Intent
The `test_generate_tests_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_generate_cases_basic. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_generate_cases_basic. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.generate_tests](file://src.tools.generate_tests)

### Exports
- `test_generate_cases_basic`
